## What is Buildout?

Buildout is a commercial real estate (CRE) platform that, through acquisitions of Rethink CRM (2021) and Apto, has consolidated three of the best-known CRE CRMs into a single product. It combines deal-pipeline management, stacking plans, property search, and a marketing-document engine that produces the offering memorandums, brochures, and flyers CRE brokers actually ship to clients.

## Who is it for?

Commercial real estate brokers, investment sales teams, and brokerages that need CRE-specific data models — properties, tenants, leases, stacking plans — rather than the buyer/seller/lead model that residential CRMs are built around.

## Strengths

- **CRE-native data model** — properties, spaces, tenants, and leases are first-class objects, not hacked-in custom fields.
- **Stacking plans** — visualize occupancy, lease expirations, and available space by floor.
- **Brochure and OM generation** — turn listings into print-ready marketing documents without a designer.
- **Deal pipeline** — CRE-shaped stages (LOI, under contract, due diligence, close), not SaaS sales stages.
- **Consolidated stack** — CRM, deal management, and marketing tools from one vendor instead of three.

## What to consider

- Pricing is "contact us" at the Rethink/Apto tier; Buildout CRM published pricing starts around $120/user/mo.
- Platform is purpose-built for CRE — useless for residential, financial advisors, or general B2B.
- Post-acquisition product consolidation is still settling; customers from pre-merge products report occasional feature gaps.
- Setup fee (~$250) on top of monthly subscription.

## Bottom line

Buildout is the default for commercial brokers who want CRE-shaped software instead of bending a general CRM to fit. If your deals involve stacking plans, lease comps, or OMs, the purpose-built tooling earns its keep fast. Residential agents should ignore this entry and look at BoldTrail, Lofty, or Follow Up Boss.
